title: Fresh Flowers and Plants
description: A Minecraft resource pack that adds 3D plant and flowers models!
body:
![Fresh Flowers and Plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/649d05dddd323a5e9e9b65b73e9fda20ef62b6ff.png)
[![Discord Server](https://img.shields.io/discord/1371956415479939173?style=for-the-badge&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&label=Discord&color=728ADA)](https://discord.gg/YqKBQtWE9T) [![YouTube Channel Subscribers](https://img.shields.io/youtube/channel/subscribers/UCgbhEot28IcFLwTiArTJXeg?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube&logoColor=white&label=Youtube&color=FF0034)](https://www.youtube.com/@swip) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1267622?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=white&label=curseforge&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-food) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/wyzOam9h?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&label=Modrinth&color=1CD96A)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-food) [![GitHub followers](https://img.shields.io/github/followers/iamcyberia?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&label=Github)](https://github.com/iamcyberia)
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/899c0e364c509449cd21d46c78cd5a7775ff9951.png) This resource pack makes all flowers, corals, saplings, and plant items appear as 3D models only when held in your hand. Everywhere else—inventory, hotbar, chests, and other GUI screens—they remain as the default 2D sprites. But if you'd rather use the 3D version of those that's possible by using [RespackOpts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)! ![All the Flowers and Plants 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02b2b9ae6077d0cd1d648dac805590e07363aa2d.png)![All the Flowers and Plants 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1094f21ea78c43db4675d6d360540ad82ba38cff.png) ![All the Flowers and Plants 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7a1954d40938b42542f1d1d71d9c3fbc186fea3.png)
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6570fc1c8af37836ab6d9863e9b10a47862ff43.png)
Recommended Mods
Required Mods on 1.21.5 and below
[![emberhost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab8a431924048c60b1386c9524ffab14d7be9c12.jpeg)](https://bit.ly/hq2897wdafu) This resourcepack is sponsored by [Ember Host](https://ember.host/). Click on the image above or use the code **"CYBER"** for a 10% discount on your first purchase! Choose [Ember Host](https://ember.host/) to host your Minecraft server and take advantage of their powerful AMD processors and go beyond with excellent prices!
![Extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af5cdff06b99e6c7ba21ae04072e98688dd2674b.png) Special thanks to [Braytonks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysworld), who's not only excellent at making stuff, but also in explaining how to! Special thanks to [Futureazoo](https://modrinth.com/user/Futureazoo) for letting me use his mushroom models and textures. If you want them to be 3d in your world as well and not just in your hands be sure to download his [Mushrooms Plus](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mushrooms-plus) pack too! Special thanks to [6_28318530717958](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/6_28318530717958/) for letting me use his 2d sprites for the Azalea, Flowering Azalea, Small Dripleaf, Big Dripleaf and Sporeblossom! Special thanks to [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay) for making the 2D sprites in the GUI! Special thanks to [Weskerson](https://modrinth.com/user/weskerson) and [Dani](https://modrinth.com/user/tixork) for the core shaders! And [Cubert](https://modrinth.com/user/cubert1), [Pato](https://modrinth.com/user/patovskiz), and [Hellay](https://modrinth.com/user/Hellay) for being my friends :) Last but not least I'd like to thank all testers in my Discord who helped me so much with feedback and finding bugs!
All My Testers [QuackingQuark](https://modrinth.com/user/QuackingQuark) [Capybaranamed2](https://modrinth.com/user/capybaranamed2) [ICE MASTER](https://modrinth.com/user/ICE_MASTER) [communist_lemon](https://modrinth.com/user/communist_lemon) [Achtari](https://modrinth.com/user/Achtari) [midvightmirage_](https://modrinth.com/user/midvightmirage_) [rjwaslive](https://modrinth.com/user/rjwaslive) [PhillWer](https://modrinth.com/user/PhillWer) [sudl](https://modrinth.com/user/sudl) [hours.wav](https://modrinth.com/user/devicestation4) RB Duckman Yousef [Prince Inah](https://modrinth.com/user/PrinceInah)
